## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Relay Financial and GrowthX to discuss content strategy progress and AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [First blog post on receipt management ready for review; aiming for 5 posts/week](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Workflow established: Google Docs for feedback, 2 revision rounds, Airtable for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [AI visibility tool (Scrunch) implemented to track Relay's presence vs competitors](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
  - [Compliance considerations for mentioning competitors; testing approach with one article](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [First blog post on receipt management ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Aiming for 5 posts/week (1 this week, 2-3 next, 5 following week)](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Feedback process: Comments in Google Docs, up to 2 revision rounds](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Manual system to incorporate feedback into future content guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)

### Workflow and Tools

  - [Airtable for content calendar and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Google Docs for content creation and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Automation set up for email notifications when content is ready](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Looker dashboard forthcoming to combine Google Search Console and GA4 data](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)

### AI Visibility Tracking

  - [Implemented Scrunch tool to monitor Relay's presence in AI responses](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
  - [Current metrics: 27% visibility, top/middle positioning, 3% citations](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Weekly PDF reports to be shared for tracking progress](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Key metrics to watch: competitive presence, overall presence, position, and citations](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)

### Compliance and Competitor Mentions

  - [Discussing approach for mentioning competitors in content](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Planning to test mentioning competitors in one article, monitor compliance feedback](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Potential to leverage Relay's custom GPT for compliance checks](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)

### Internal Linking Strategy

  - [Semi-automated process for adding internal links to new content](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Relay team working on categorizing content for more strategic internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [GrowthX team open to incorporating Relay's linking priorities](https://fathom.video/share/qnm6TWBLCeRcmbFnuVaC3sC-YfKcpqUp?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
